title: United Airlines invests undisclosed sum in sodium ion battery maker Natron Energy
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc. UAL, +1.56% said Wednesday it's investing an undisclosed sum in sodium ion batter maker Natron Energy Inc., a Santa Clara, Calif.-based energy storage company founded in 2012.

title: Analysis: Airlines reboot as COVID sparks a revolution in one-day business trips
